hero.subtitle: No complaint is lost. No deadline is invisible. No step is undocumented. Start managing citizen grievances the way a modern office should.

dashboard.subtitle: Real-time overview of citizen complaints, team activity, and analytics.

landing.replaceWhatsapp: Replace WhatsApp chains and paper registers with one accountable system — where every grievance is captured, AI-prioritised, and closed on time.
landing.scatteredProblem: Phone calls, walk-ins, registers, sticky notes, group chats — everything ends up scattered across people, and when someone leaves, the knowledge leaves too. There is no single source of truth.
landing.needsNothingElse: Everything a government office needs. Nothing it doesn't.
landing.multiOfficeDesc: Each constituency or department operates in a completely isolated data environment. One platform serves dozens of offices with zero data crossover and independent configuration.
landing.aiScored: Every new complaint is scored automatically before staff see it — so critical cases surface to the top, not the bottom of the queue.
landing.noLogin: No login. No app. Just results.
landing.citizenAccess: Citizens don't need an account to file, track, or rate. Three actions — available from any browser, on any device.
landing.scatteredSources: Phone calls, walk-ins, registers, sticky notes, group chats — everything ends up scattered across people, and when someone leaves, the knowledge leaves too. There is no single source of truth.
landing.autoScored: Every new complaint is scored automatically before staff see it — so critical cases surface to the top, not the bottom of the queue.
landing.complaintExample: “Water supply has been cut for 3 days in Block 12. Children are sick. Multiple families affected. Nobody is responding to our calls.”
landing.duplicateDetail: TF-IDF cosine similarity against recent complaints in the same tenant. Flags near-duplicates for staff review — saves officer time, gives leaders accurate counts.
landing.duplicateExample: Same pothole filed 8 times → flagged as duplicate cluster
landing.citizenRatesDesc: Citizen submits a 1–5 satisfaction rating using only their tracking ID. Aggregated into the analytics dashboard. Immutable audit trail preserved permanently.
landing.rateServiceDesc: Once resolved, submit a 1–5 satisfaction rating and comment. This data flows directly into the leadership analytics dashboard.
landing.accountabilityFirst: Built for accountability, not just tracking.
landing.immutableAudit: Every status transition — who changed what, from what, to what, at what time — is written atomically to the database. Court-admissible, irreversible, always on.
landing.chronologicalRecord: Full chronological record survives any personnel change.
landing.roleScopes: Every user sees exactly what they need — nothing more. Role scopes are enforced in code, not policy.
landing.modernGrievance: Modern grievance management for government offices — accountable, transparent, AI-powered.

features.f1Desc: OPEN → ASSIGNED → IN PROGRESS → RESOLVED → CLOSED. Role-gated transitions enforced by the system — no skipping, no silent closures, no workarounds.
features.f2Desc: Three on-device engines — priority prediction, sentiment analysis, duplicate detection — score every complaint before a human touches it. No external API, no extra cost.
features.f3Desc: Per-department deadlines with a background job that warns at 75% elapsed time and auto-escalates breaches every 30 minutes — with email alerts dispatched automatically.
features.f4Desc: Seven live reports — Overview, Trends, Department Performance, Officer Leaderboard, SLA Heatmap, Escalation Trends, Category Distribution — scoped to the viewer's authority.
features.f5Desc: Server-Sent Events deliver instant in-app alerts on assignment, status change and SLA breach. No polling, no page refresh — the dashboard updates the moment something changes.

workflows.w1Desc: Through the public portal or via staff. Instant tracking ID issued. AI scores priority, sentiment, and duplicate status before a human opens it.
workflows.w2Desc: Admin or Department Head assigns to officer. System enforces scope — officers see only their own queue, heads only their department.
workflows.w3Desc: Officer moves through the enforced lifecycle with full notes, file attachments and an SLA timer visible on every card—escalating automatically if breached.

citizenCards.c1Desc: Submit any grievance — road, water, sanitation, safety — with a description and optional contact details. No account, no app download.
citizenCards.c2Desc: Enter your tracking ID to see the current status, assigned department, officer name, and last update — live, in real time.

details.d1Desc: Officers and citizens attach photos, scanned documents, and site reports directly to the complaint. Files stored with signed, time-limited access links — no permanent public exposure.
details.d1Detail: Officers see evidence before visiting the site.
details.d2Desc: Officers and department heads add private notes to complaints — field observations, coordination details, internal decisions — never visible to citizens.
details.d2Detail: No more parallel WhatsApp threads that disappear.

rolesTable.superAdminDesc: System configuration, tenant creation, and global oversight.
rolesTable.tenantAdminDesc: Manages a single office/constituency. Creates departments & staff.
rolesTable.departmentHeadDesc: Oversees one department. Assigns complaints. Views department analytics.
rolesTable.officerDesc: Resolves assigned complaints. Updates status. Adds internal notes.
rolesTable.citizenDesc: Public portal access. Submits, tracks, and rates complaints.

landing.engine1Detail: Rates CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW based on the description. A burst water main ranks higher than a noise complaint — automatically, every time.
landing.engine2Detail: Detects distress, urgency and frustration in the citizens language. Distressed reports surface in leadership views before calm ones at the same priority.
landing.rolesDesc: Every user sees exactly what they need — nothing more. Role scopes are enforced in code, not policy.
landing.rolePlatformOwnerDoes: Global platform management, cross-state audit and analytics, top-level tenant provisioning
landing.roleSuperAdminDoes: Cross-office management within their state, tenant provisioning, state-wide audit and analytics
landing.roleAdminDoes: Full office management — user creation, department setup, all complaints within their tenant
landing.roleDeptHeadDoes: Assign complaints within their department, department analytics, SLA monitoring for their team
landing.roleOfficerDoes: See and action only their own assignments — update status, add notes, upload evidence
landing.roleCallOperatorDoes: Log complaints on behalf of citizens — phone, walk-in, letter — and track them by ID

submit.title: Submit a Complaint
submit.subtitle: No account required. Fill in the details below and you'll receive a tracking ID instantly.
submit.successDesc: Your complaint has been received. Use the tracking ID below to check its status anytime.
submit.selectOrgWarning: Please select an organisation from the list.
submit.emailHelp: You'll receive updates about your complaint on this email.
submit.localityHelp: Helps us route your complaint to the right officer and prevents it from being marked as a duplicate of a similar complaint in a different area.
submit.descriptionHelp: Please describe your grievance in detail. The more info you provide, the faster it can be resolved.

track.title: Track Your Complaint
track.subtitle: Enter your tracking ID to check the status of your complaint

citizenDashboard.title: Citizen Service Center
citizenDashboard.summaryText: . Here's a summary of your filed complaints and their current status.
citizenDashboard.noComplaintsDesc: You haven't submitted any complaints. Use the button above to file your first one.
citizenDashboard.trackYourComplaintDesc: Use your Tracking ID (sent to your email) to check the live status without logging in.
citizenDashboard.fileNewComplaintDesc: Submit a new grievance to your local authority. You'll receive a Tracking ID via email.
